subject: Re: [PROSPECT] Re: Partnership opportunity for Cobalt Power Systems
body:
Hi Arianna-

We'd like to set up a time for our leadership to speak with your team about partnership opportunities.

Is there a time/date that would work next week for a 30 min chat via Microsoft Teams?

Kindly,
Ty


Ty Whittaker (She/Her) | Digital Marketing Manager

2557 Wyandotte Street | Mountain View, CA  94043
Direct: 650-220-5151 | Email: tyw@cobaltpower.com<mailto:tyw@cobaltpower.com>
[cid:fe5d5f4e-961b-475a-8a62-93f51b645098]


________________________________
From: Arianna Dar <partnerships@synergicsolarteam.com>
Sent: Friday, April 3, 2026 3:36 PM
To: Info <info@cobaltpower.com>
Subject: [PROSPECT] Re: Partnership opportunity for Cobalt Power Systems

Following up on the Synergic dealer partnership
[Synergic Solar]

Synergic Solar

Dealer Network  �P  All 50 States

Hi Mark Byington,

I reached out a few days ago about Synergic's dealer program. Just wanted to make sure my message didn't get lost.

Quick highlights that dealers tell us matter most:

  *   Transparent redlines �X you see exactly what you earn on every project
  *   Keep your brand �X sell under your name, not ours
  *   L1/L2 overrides �X refer other dealers and earn on their production, two levels deep

Worth a quick look? See the full program here<https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__synergicsolar.com_r_vwHf_m_9589&d=DwMFaQ&c=euGZstcaTDllvimEN8b7jXrwqOf-v5A_CdpgnVfiiMM&r=B9lkvTxkdiqUEaX-vLoK05qeoaeACNdftV87FfHzRvg&m=7L7-sHfrdM9aiJZZZyqLUMV7mo6uAaVT2u_GpYJxQuNj3V-ZLoXa-cN-_wKUoiRh&s=N4AihOqeYGWd_cM8mLUKzsiENZALurORBrhzuYBEr5M&e=>.

Best,
Arianna Dar
Dealer Partnerships | Synergic Solar

Start Your Dealer Application ��<https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__synergicsolar.com_r_6G4D_m_9589&d=DwMFaQ&c=euGZstcaTDllvimEN8b7jXrwqOf-v5A_CdpgnVfiiMM&r=B9lkvTxkdiqUEaX-vLoK05qeoaeACNdftV87FfHzRvg&m=7L7-sHfrdM9aiJZZZyqLUMV7mo6uAaVT2u_GpYJxQuNj3V-ZLoXa-cN-_wKUoiRh&s=q3CgF7dXVYOrNt57GesjFxYdFFDnaEZdyiwjwOHgoRk&e=>

Takes about 5 minutes  �P  No commitment required to explore

Synergic Solar LLC  �P  Sheridan, WY

subject: Re: [PROSPECT] Solar dealers in Richton Park - a partnership opportunity
body:
Hi James, hi Arianna,

Thank you for reaching out.

Solar Professionals of Illinois has been in business for seven years, and
we also operate under the name Sol4All.com. Over the past year, we
successfully completed 110 residential installations and 3 commercial
projects. Toward the end of the year, demand increased significantly,
prompting us to expand our installation capacity.

We would welcome the chance to support your customers in Illinois and
to collaborate when additional installation resources are needed on either
side.

We are a full-service EPC and an Approved Vendor (2700), with Designee
certifications D3846 and D5599 under the Illinois Shines program.
Additionally, we are a licensed General Contractor with the Illinois
Commerce Commission (License #25-1074). Our roofing division, Roof4You.biz,
provides full roofing services to complement our solar installations.

We offer financing solutions through Concert Financial, Atmos Financial,
Sungage Financial, and Figure Financial, and we also install TPO systems in
partnership with LightReach Palmetto.

We look forward to the opportunity to collaborate and support each other’s
growth.

Best regards,

Thank you,
Luis Vigo
Sales Manager
Solar Professionals Of Illinois <https://solarprofessionalsofillinois.com/>
4137 Sauk Trail suite 333 Richton Park IL 60471
1 855 765 4 255 = 1 855 *SOL 4 ALL*
Cell - 1 773 220 5830
Luis.Vigo@SolarProfessionalsOfIllinois.com

subject: Re: [PROSPECT] Solar dealers in East Taunton - a partnership opportunity
body:
Hi Arianna
Hi would like to learn more. I’m available for a call on Monday. 

Thanks 
Phil

Sent from my iPhone

On Apr 11, 2026, at 3:37 PM, Arianna Dar <partnerships@synergicsolarteam.com> wrote:

﻿
Partnership opportunity for solar dealers in East Taunton

Synergic Solar

Dealer Network  ·  All 50 States

Hi Phillip McCarron,

I came across Beacon Solar Construction in East Taunton and was impressed by your work in the solar space.

At Synergic, we've built a dealer platform designed for solar sales teams who want to keep their brand and earn more:

  • Competitive redlines — industry-leading PPW pricing on residential and commercial projects
  • L1/L2 dealer overrides — earn ongoing overrides on every dealer you refer into the network, two levels deep
  • Dealer referral program — earn on every dealer you bring into the network
  • Full marketing platform — AI-powered lead gen, SMS, voice, and email built into your CRM
  • DIT to Master Dealer growth path — start free, scale to six figures/month

We're onboarding select dealers now. Would you be open to a quick 15-minute call? Or check out the details: synergicsolar.com/dealers
